item.title: Fixing chromium in debian unstable
item.description: For some (in my opinion pants-on-head-retarded) reason the maintainers of the chromium package in debian have chosen to disallow loading of extensions from the chrome store. They claim that this will pave the way towards “distro-packaged” extensions, but as of yet I haven’t seen a single one in the repos, not even ublock. What’s worse, the only notice you get is if you upgrade from a version before this “fix” was applied.
